description:
Using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, perform dose-response analyses on the esophageal cancer case-control dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\esophageal_cancer.csv'. Conduct TABLES analyses for 'CaseStatus' by 'AlcoholGroup' and 'CaseStatus' by 'TobaccoGroup' to determine the Chi-Square for Linear Trend and p-values. Record the findings in a summary text file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiResults\dose_response_results.txt' using the following format:

Alcohol_ChiSq_Trend: [value]
Alcohol_Trend_PValue: [value]
Tobacco_ChiSq_Trend: [value]
Tobacco_Trend_PValue: [value]
Alcohol_DoseResponse: [Yes/No]
Tobacco_DoseResponse: [Yes/No]
